item_specifications.special_feature: Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Washable

about_item: L Shaped Dog Bed: The COZY KISS orthopedic dog bed helps distribute weight evenly, providing optimal pressure relief and joint support. It is particularly beneficial for senior pets, large dogs, or those with arthritis. Please note: Due to vacuum compression, the bed requires 24-48 hours to fully expand to its original shape, the inner lining helps to prevent liquid penetration into foam, but the soft plush outer layer itself is not waterproof

High-Density Sponge: The foam dog bed can support weights between 40 and 150 lbs. The dog ramp utilizes 25D high-density pure sponge, offering superior support and reducing stress on pets' joints from repeated jumping on and off sofas and couches. The cover boasts a full, plush suede-like texture, providing a very soft, smooth, and thick handfeel, ensuring comfortable and cozy sitting or lying experiences year-round

Easy Assembly & Cleaning: This easy-to-clean dog bed comes with a removable, machine-washable cover. Simply unzip the cover, place it in a normal wash cycle, and let it air dry. Tip: Use a lint roller to remove pet hair before washing. It is also recommended to place the cover in a laundry bag to prevent deformation and tangling, thereby extending its lifespan. There is a grip on the back for easy carrying and can be used both indoors and outdoors

Leak-Proof & Anti-Slip: The base is made from non-slip nylon to minimize movement of the dog bed. The rubber, non-slip bottom securely keeps the pet bed in place for both large and small dogs on any floor. A waterproof lining helps prevent liquids from seeping into the foam, so you don't have to worry about your dog peeing on the bed

Multi-Scenario Use: Available in various sizes, each tailored to specific weight ranges. This versatile dog bed can be used at home, during road trips, or outdoors. You can choose the appropriate size and color based on your pet's needs. Whether you need a large dog bed or a travel-friendly dog mat, there is a size that fits your requirements

summary.text: Customers find this pet bed to be of excellent quality, with a soft but firm padding that's comfortable and durable. The bed is well-sized for large dogs, and customers appreciate its washability and easy cleaning. They consider it worth the price and particularly suitable for dogs, with one customer noting it's great for dogs with hip dysplasia.

authors_reviews.title: Well made
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size ( large) for my Australian Shepherd.Well madeWashable coverMy dog loves it.
authors_reviews.author: Sherry Fitz

authors_reviews.title: Awesome 👍🏼
authors_reviews.text: Beautiful well made bed😍. I ordered the L L 36” L x27” W but my dog 🐕 was too big so I sized up. For reference she is a 75lb Retriever Pit mix - This one will be given to the cat 🐈‍⬛ lol - Point is, the 💵 deal on this bed is so good, just buy it! P.S. it takes a whole day to fluff up so don’t freak out
authors_reviews.author: Monique

authors_reviews.title: She loves it!
authors_reviews.text: This is the 2nd dog bed that we ordered. We have the larger one for home and use the XL for travel. Our 80# dog fits perfectly and she’s comfortable while traveling. We love the size although it’s a tad bit smaller than the “home” one she has plenty of room. It doesn’t slip around while traveling. With the substantial padding she’s not feeling the bumps and stuff from road travel. We love and apparently she does also. We place it behind the driver’s seat in our Pacifica and it doesn’t block the floor air vents. It would’ve also fit well in an SUV.
authors_reviews.author: M Davis

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for dogs larger than 70 lbs with orthopedic issues
authors_reviews.text: My 6 year old, 80-lb labradoodle goes to work with me every day and I needed a comfortable place for him to lay while I’m working. He loves the bolsters on the side so he has somewhere to rest his head. As an older guy, he also has hip / knee issues so orthopedic comfort was a huge priority for us.Turns out it’s incredibly difficult to get a quality dog bed for large breed dogs that won’t cost you an arm and a leg. I originally purchased a bed that ended up being too small for him and ended up needing something he could comfortably stretch out on.After finding this one on sale, I was so impressed with the value for the money and the quality and thickness of the memory foam. Finally, a bed that’s actually large enough for him (and me - it’s so comfortable I’ve taken a nap on it myself!)
authors_reviews.author: Torrence

authors_reviews.title: Nice dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Nicely made. Perfect size for my rough collie
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie Lucas

authors_reviews.title: Nice dog bed

authors_reviews.title: Comfy and large enough for a Retriever
authors_reviews.text: Large and comfy… water resistant. My dogs love the bed. A visiting puppy immediately tinkled in it and remarkably I was able to clean it up because of the water resistant cover. It blotted dry!
authors_reviews.author: BCornell

authors_reviews.title: GSD Finds it Cozy
authors_reviews.text: My German Shepherd Dog loves this! It fits him nicely and he seems so cozy sprawled out on it. The color and fabric are of decent quality for the price.
